description: Vault for liminal structures, thresholds, border-region contracts, and LSG-heavy environment descriptors.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: May encode explicit descriptions of liminal spaces; ensure access controls are enforced.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All liminal contracts and threshold envelopes must declare schemaRef to their canonical schemas.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Contracts must declare invariant focus (LSG, CIC, AOS) and link back to regionContractCard IDs.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All liminalContractCard authoring must be routed via the spine.

authoringHints.summary: Use this repo to encode liminal structures and threshold behaviors that overlay region cards.
aiBehavior: Only create liminalContractCard and thresholdEnvelope artifacts here.
Always anchor liminal contracts to existing regionContractCard IDs in Black-Archivum.
Treat LSG and HVF as primary invariants; tune metrics for subtle dread rather than explicit horror.
